name: cyclaudes
description: Cyclaudes — structural UI verification that lets the agent verify its own UI work instead of waiting on a human.

plugins.name: cyclaudes
plugins.description: Structural UI verification for the autonomous loop: the verify-ui skill, a PostToolUse hook that flags UI edits, a Stop-gate that blocks "done" until they're verified, and the touchpoint MCP. Drive a real app, assert pass/fail/abstain. Requires the pip engine (see README).
